text: session started · model: deepseek-chat · mode: 🤖 conversational
hey, can you help me understand how the empirica chat is supposed to render epistemic actions?

Yep — in Phase 4, when I (the agent) log a finding, decision, or unknown via the empirica CLI, the chat will render it as a styled card right here in the conversation flow, not buried in a tool-call expand. You'll see it the same moment I create it, with quick-action buttons (👍 confirm, 👎 challenge, 💬 discuss). For now (Phase 1) we're just rendering plain text turns to validate the layout and persistence.

Every turn appends one JSON line to ~/.empirica/chat_sessions/{session_id}.jsonl — that file IS the source of truth. Replay mode (Phase 7) reads it back. You can `tail -F` it to watch the conversation in real-time from another terminal.
(end of sample feed — try typing your own messages)
